creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
beech       2008-01-18 00:09:20 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    www/diamanda         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/diamanda/files   pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  - New port diamanda-0.0.2007.04.26
  
  - Diamanda Applications Set is a set of useful Django applications.
    Currently there are such applications as Articles, News,
    Forum (MyghtyBoard) and others.
  
  PR:             ports/119551
  Submitted by:   Oleg Ukraincev <oleg@ht-systems.ru> (maintainer)
  Approved by:    linimon (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +50 -0     ports/www/diamanda/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/diamanda/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/www/diamanda/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/www/diamanda/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +416 -0    ports/www/diamanda/pkg-plist (new)
